narrative: A seeded 12-minute delay leaves projected fuel reserve at 18%, 6 percentage points above the 12% policy floor. The supplied scenario keeps the trip on its planned corridor; no fuel-stop review is needed. Driver review remains available before any external action.
limitations: Seeded local demo; no live GPS, traffic, map, fuel-price, telematics, or dispatch feed.
This draft does not control a vehicle or issue a driving instruction.
